questions.question: What is the SQL command used to add a new column 'Commission' with a domain 'DECIMAL(10, 2)' to the 'Employees' table?
If the 'Employees' table already has a column 'Salary' of type DECIMAL(10, 2), what would be the SQL command to modify the existing column to 'Commission'?
What is the purpose of using a domain when adding a new column to a table in a database management system?
